introduction: The new Viaplay original production, penned by Julie Budtz Sørensen and based on her award-winning Danish podcast "Det med Liv", revolves around a 16-year-old girl called Louise, whose life is turned upside down when her best friend Monica is raped at a party. Burdened by guilt, Louise single-handedly begins to investigate the crime, but the more she unravels, the more complicated it becomes. When digging deeper into the case, Louise discovers that everyone has secrets and forbidden emotions, and she begins to suspect that the rapist might be someone within her circle of friends. It all comes to a head when Louise starts to develop feelings for a mysterious outsider, Thais, who – according to her friends – is the alleged rapist. Suddenly, Louise is faced with a difficult decision: should she stick with her friends, or follow her heart and defend Thais, whom she believes is innocent?
